title: Senior Identity and Access Management Engineer
company: If P&C Insurance AS Latvijas filiāle
location: Republikas Laukums 2A, Centra rajons, Rīga, LV-1010

summary.lv: Senior Identitātes un piekļuves pārvaldības (IAM) inženiera amats If P&C Insurance, projektējot un veidojot IAM sistēmas ar OpenID Connect, OAuth 2.1 un SCIM, izmantojot C#, Azure Entra ID un mākoņa resursus.
summary.en: A Senior Identity and Access Management (IAM) Engineer role at If P&C Insurance designing and building IAM systems with OpenID Connect, OAuth 2.1 and SCIM, using C#, Azure Entra ID and cloud resources.
